content:
✅ Why This Works:
• Encourages students to take ownership of the reading list.
• Offers a low-stakes, exploratory engagement option.
• Creates a class-curated literary database.
• Helps students discover new texts beyond the syllabus.

2️⃣ Final Project & Optional Creative Component + Weekly Creative Extra Credit

📜 Updated Final Project Structure:
• Research Paper remains the core deliverable (5-7 pages).
• Students can add an optional creative extension.
• Three creative formats (as outlined previously):
1. Adaptation Analysis (rewriting a scene in a different medium).
2. Visual Component (mood boards, infographics, zines).
3. Fictionalized Response (writing in the style of or responding to a text).
• Reflection required for creative components.
• Optional but incentivized.

📌 Weekly Creative Extra Credit:
